user.title: Select Keypad
user.description: Found {count} keypad(s) on your Lutron bridge. Select the one you want to configure.

confirm.title: Confirm Keypad

error.lutron_not_loaded: The Lutron Caséta integration is not loaded. Set it up first.
error.device_not_found: Selected device could not be found. Try again.

abort.lutron_not_loaded: The Lutron Caséta integration must be set up before adding keypads.

action.title: Button {button_index} of {total_buttons} — Choose Action
action.description: Configuring **Button {current_button}**. Select the action this button will perform.

entity.title: Button {button_index} of {total_buttons} — Pick Entity
entity.description:
**Action:** `{action_type}`

Select the target entity or entities.

data.led_entity: LED Entity (optional — lights up when this scene is active)
data.scene_group: Scene Group (optional — keypads sharing a group track the same active scene)

label.title: Button {button_index} of {total_buttons} — Confirm Label

auto.title: Button {button_index} of {total_buttons} — Auto-Assigned
auto.description: Button **{current_button}** is automatically assigned as **{icon} {action}** — raises or lowers shades/lights based on the last active action. No further configuration needed.
